title: Roasted Ethiopian Aubergine Tagine
description: A flavorful and spicy tagine dish featuring roasted aubergine, inspired by traditional Ethiopian cuisine.

ingredients.name: Ethiopian berbere spice blend
ingredients.notes: Available at most Middle Eastern or African grocery stores

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for another minute.
Add the roasted aubergine, baby tomatoes, berbere spice blend, salt, and black pepper.
Stir to combine and cook for 5-7 minutes.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot over rice or with injera bread.
Optional: garnish with chopped fresh cilantro or parsley.
